faqs.question: What spider species are most common in West Farms, Bronx?
faqs.answer: West Farms residents most frequently encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, and occasionally wolf spiders, particularly in basements and near the Bronx River green spaces. While most are harmless, our technicians identify all species during inspection and eliminate them using targeted treatments that prevent future infestations in your specific property type.
